questions.prompt: An install fails with 'unable to register agent: invalid account secret key'. What's the most likely cause?
choices: A stray space at the start or end of the Account Key
questions.explanation: The Account Key is exactly 32 characters. Whitespace pasted in front of or behind the key is the most common cause of this error. Re-copy and confirm the length.

questions.prompt: On a Windows endpoint with Tamper Protection enabled, you can run a local uninstall immediately without disabling Tamper Protection first.
questions.explanation: Local uninstall on a Tamper-Protected Windows or macOS endpoint requires Tamper Protection disabled for ~30 minutes first. The remote-uninstall route from the portal bypasses this.
